text: We provide three references from customers with similar industry, scale, and regulatory requirements. Each includes named contacts (roles) and we arrange introductions with their consent for candid discussions.
We provide detailed case studies with measurable outcomes (e.g., risk reduction, performance improvements) and openly discuss both strengths and limitations experienced by customers.
References are prepared to discuss security posture, incidents (if any), compensating controls, and support experience including escalations and responsiveness.
References are current (recent deployments within 12–18 months) and reflect similar compliance requirements (e.g., HIPAA, GDPR, FedRAMP) to ensure relevance.
We provide references, but they are not closely aligned with your industry, size, or regulatory requirements.
We share case studies or testimonials, but do not provide direct customer contacts for verification.
References are available but from older deployments or customers with different security maturity levels.
References highlight positive outcomes but provide limited insight into challenges, incidents, or trade-offs.
All customers are under NDA, so we cannot provide any references.
We only provide references from older customers that do not match your use case.
References are uniformly positive and appear coached, without discussion of any limitations.
Our customer list is confidential and cannot be shared.
